package.name: tracked_robot_odom
package.description:
Simple planar tracked-robot odometry node for the Dicerox Stage A demo.
Implements the kinematic model: v_L = v - omega * track_separation / 2 v_R = v + omega * track_separation / 2 where v and omega come from /cmd_vel. The pose is integrated and published as nav_msgs/Odometry on /odom plus the odom->base_footprint TF.
